pve:proxmox:CPU.description: CPU configuration for the virtual machine.

cores.description: Number of CPU cores per socket.

flagsDisabled.description: List of CPU flags to disable.

flagsEnabled.description: List of CPU flags to enable (e.g., pcid, spec-ctrl).

hidden.description: Hide VM CPU type from the guest operating system.

hvVendorId.description: Hyper-V vendor ID presented to the guest (up to 12 characters).

limit.description: CPU usage limit as a fraction of one core (e.g., 1.5 caps at 150%).

physBits.description: Number of physical address bits exposed to the guest (e.g., 36, 40, 48).

units.description: CPU weight for the scheduler relative to other VMs (higher = more CPU time).

vcpus.description: Number of hotplugged vCPUs (must be <= cores * sockets).

pve:proxmox:Clone.description: Configuration for cloning a source virtual machine.

dataStoreId.description: Target storage pool for the cloned disks.

fullClone.description: Create a full independent clone instead of a linked clone.

node.description: Target Proxmox node for the clone operation.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for the clone operation.

vmId.description: Source VM ID to clone from.

pve:proxmox:Disk.description: Disk configuration for the virtual machine.

filename.description: File name of the disk image (computed by Proxmox if not provided).

interface.description: Disk interface type and slot (e.g., scsi0, virtio0, ide1, sata2).

storage.description: Target storage pool for the disk (e.g., local-lvm, ceph-pool).

pve:proxmox:EfiDisk.description: EFI disk configuration for the virtual machine.

efitype.description: EFI firmware size: '2m' (2 MB, legacy) or '4m' (4 MB, supports Secure Boot).

filename.description: File name of the EFI disk image (computed by Proxmox if not provided).

preEnrolledKeys.description: Pre-enroll Microsoft and standard UEFI keys into the EFI firmware.

storage.description: Target storage pool for the EFI disk (e.g., local-lvm).

pve:proxmox:NumaNode.description: NUMA node topology configuration for the virtual machine.

cpus.description: CPUs (and optionally threads) assigned to this NUMA node (e.g., 0-3).

hostNodes.description: Host NUMA nodes to map to this virtual NUMA node (e.g., 0-1).

memory.description: Memory in megabytes allocated to this NUMA node.

policy.description: NUMA memory allocation policy (preferred, bind, interleave, or mpol).

pve:acl:ACL.description: A Proxmox ACL resource that controls access to Proxmox objects.

propagate.description: Whether the ACL should propagate to child objects.

roleid.description: The role ID of the ACL.

type.description: The type of the ACL. Must be one of 'user', 'group', or 'token'.

ugid.description: The user, group, or token ID associated with the ACL.

propagate.description: Whether the ACL should propagate to child objects.

roleid.description: The role ID of the ACL.

type.description: The type of the ACL. Must be one of 'user', 'group', or 'token'.

ugid.description: The user, group, or token ID associated with the ACL.

pve:file:File.description: A Proxmox file resource that represents a file in a Proxmox datastore.

contentType.description: The type of the file (e.g: snippets)

datastoreId.description: The datastore to upload the file to.  (e.g:ceph-ha)

contentType.description: The type of the file (e.g: snippets)

datastoreId.description: The datastore to upload the file to.  (e.g:ceph-ha)

pve:group:Group.description: A Proxmox group resource that represents a group in the Proxmox VE.

comment.description: An optional comment for the group. If not provided, defaults to 'Default group comment'.

name.description: The name of the Proxmox group.

comment.description: An optional comment for the group. If not provided, defaults to 'Default group comment'.

name.description: The name of the Proxmox group.

pve:ha:HA.description: A Proxmox HA resource that manages the HA configuration of a virtual machine in the Proxmox VE.

resourceId.description: The ID of the virtual machine that will be managed by HA (required).

state.description: The state of the HA resource (default: started).

resourceId.description: The ID of the virtual machine that will be managed by HA (required).

state.description: The state of the HA resource (default: started).

pve:pool:Pool.description: A Proxmox pool resource that groups virtual machines under a common pool in the Proxmox VE.

comment.description: An optional comment for the pool

name.description: The name of the Proxmox pool.

storage.description: An optional list of storage names to assign to the pool.

vms.description: An optional list of VM IDs to assign to the pool.

comment.description: An optional comment for the pool

name.description: The name of the Proxmox pool.

storage.description: An optional list of storage names to assign to the pool.

vms.description: An optional list of VM IDs to assign to the pool.

pve:role:Role.description: A Proxmox role resource that represents a role in the Proxmox VE.

name.description: The name of the Proxmox role.

privileges.description: A list of privileges assigned to this role. Each privilege should be a string identifier (e.g., 'VM.PowerMgmt').

name.description: The name of the Proxmox role.

privileges.description: A list of privileges assigned to this role. Each privilege should be a string identifier (e.g., 'VM.PowerMgmt').

pve:user:User.description: A Proxmox user resource that represents a user in the Proxmox VE.

comment.description: An optional comment for the user.

email.description: An optional email address for the user.

enable.description: Whether the user is enabled. Defaults to true.

expire.description: The expiration time for the user as a Unix timestamp.

firstname.description: The first name of the user.

groups.description: A list of groups the user belongs to.

keys.description: A list of SSH keys associated with the user.

lastname.description: The last name of the user.

password.description: The password for the user. This field is treated as a secret.

userid.description: The user ID of the Proxmox user, including the realm (e.g., 'user@pve').

comment.description: An optional comment for the user.

email.description: An optional email address for the user.

enable.description: Whether the user is enabled. Defaults to true.

expire.description: The expiration time for the user as a Unix timestamp.

firstname.description: The first name of the user.

groups.description: A list of groups the user belongs to.

keys.description: A list of SSH keys associated with the user.

lastname.description: The last name of the user.

password.description: The password for the user. This field is treated as a secret.

userid.description: The user ID of the Proxmox user, including the realm (e.g., 'user@pve').

autostart.description: Automatically start the VM when the host boots (1 to enable, 0 to disable).

balloon.description: Minimum memory for ballooning in megabytes (0 disables the balloon device).

clone.description: Clone configuration for creating the VM from a source template or VM.

cpu.description: CPU configuration including type, topology, and feature flags.

description.description: Description or notes for the virtual machine.

disks.description: List of disk configurations attached to the virtual machine.

efidisk.description: EFI disk configuration (required when bios is set to ovmf).

hotplug.description: Comma-separated list of hotplug features (network, disk, cpu, memory, usb).

machine.description: Machine type for the VM (e.g., pc, q35, pc-i440fx-8.1).

node.description: Proxmox node where the VM resides.

ostype.description: Guest operating system type (e.g., l26, win11, other).

tags.description: Tags associated with the virtual machine.

template.description: Mark the VM as a template (1) or a regular VM (0).

vmId.description: Unique numeric identifier for the virtual machine (auto-assigned if omitted).

autostart.description: Automatically start the VM when the host boots (1 to enable, 0 to disable).

balloon.description: Minimum memory for ballooning in megabytes (0 disables the balloon device).

clone.description: Clone configuration for creating the VM from a source template or VM.

cpu.description: CPU configuration including type, topology, and feature flags.

description.description: Description or notes for the virtual machine.

disks.description: List of disk configurations attached to the virtual machine.

efidisk.description: EFI disk configuration (required when bios is set to ovmf).

hotplug.description: Comma-separated list of hotplug features (network, disk, cpu, memory, usb).

machine.description: Machine type for the VM (e.g., pc, q35, pc-i440fx-8.1).

node.description: Proxmox node where the VM resides.

ostype.description: Guest operating system type (e.g., l26, win11, other).

tags.description: Tags associated with the virtual machine.

template.description: Mark the VM as a template (1) or a regular VM (0).

vmId.description: Unique numeric identifier for the virtual machine (auto-assigned if omitted).
